title: DGOS — Digital Guest Ordering System
description: Production restaurant ordering platform on AWS running at ~$0.80/month. Customers scan QR codes, browse menus, place orders, and see real-time kitchen status updates. 3 SPAs (customer, kitchen, admin) with Cognito auth, DynamoDB, and WebSocket push.

title: VOTECHAIN
description: A blockchain-based electronic voting system with multi-factor authentication, immutable vote records, and a real-time public transparency dashboard.

title: DAMPos
description: A mini operating system simulation covering file management, memory management, process management, and miscellaneous system applications.

title: Up To Date
description: An AI-powered news dashboard with RSS feeds, Hacker News feeds, custom sources, keyboard shortcuts, PWA support, and Groq-powered article summaries.

title: NihonPath
description: A fully static, zero-CDN Japanese learning web app for Hiragana, Katakana, JLPT N5–N3 Kanji (500 chars), and Vocabulary (200 words). Features gojuon chart selection, multi-mode quizzes, Web Speech API pronunciation, sakura progress metaphor, and localStorage lifetime stats.

title: Graphien
description: A zero-knowledge, client-side encrypted journaling PWA with AES-256, historical ciphers, and a custom symbol/font builder. Everything stays in the browser — no server, no telemetry.

title: Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional
description: A professional certificate focused on advanced data analytics concepts, tools, and applied analytical workflows.

title: ISO, CMMI & Project Quality Certification Mastery
description: A certification focused on quality management concepts, process improvement, ISO, CMMI, and project quality practices.

title: AWS Cloud Solutions Architect
description: AWS Solutions Architect specialization covering architectural design for compute, storage, networking, security, and cost optimization on AWS — including data-lake design, ingestion, and certification exam preparation.

title: IBM DevOps, Cloud, and Agile Foundations
description: Foundations of DevOps culture and practices, cloud computing models, Agile methodology (small batches, pair programming, TDD), and Scrum frameworks (product backlog, sprint planning, velocity).

title: IBM Systems Analyst
description: Systems analysis specialization covering process modeling, requirements gathering, stakeholder management, IT systems design and analysis, data visualization, and applied generative AI for systems problems.

title: Network Automation Engineering Fundamentals
description: Network automation fundamentals covering NETCONF, RESTCONF, gNMI, and YANG modeling, plus scripting security topics with Ansible and Python.

title: IBM Applied DevOps Engineering
description: An in-progress professional certificate focused on DevOps practices, automation, CI/CD, containers, and deployment workflows.

title: Logos
description: A self-hosted AI-powered personalized feed reader that combines news, media, and web content into one intelligent dashboard.

title: Siyasat
description: A single-player, campaign-based AI incident response simulator for a fictional developer API platform, built around a 7-day enterprise rollout and professional SRE dashboard experience.

title: Google Cybersecurity Certificate
description: A cybersecurity professional certificate focused on security fundamentals, risk management, networks, Linux, SQL, Python, and security operations with SIEM tooling.
